name: fastvdma
description: FastVDMA is a highly configurable and portable DMA controller supporting 2D transfers with configurable stride, external frame synchronization, and multiple bus protocols including AXI4, AXI-Stream, and Wishbone.

interfaces.description: AXI4 data bus interface for memory-mapped transactions.
AXI-Stream interface for streaming data transfers.
AXI4-Lite control bus interface for configuration and status.
Wishbone control bus interface for configuration and status.
Clock input for the DMA controller.
Active-high reset signal for the DMA controller.
Interrupt signal to indicate transfer completion or error.

parameters.name: DATA_WIDTH
parameters.description: Width of the data bus in bits.

parameters.name: ADDR_WIDTH
parameters.description: Width of the address bus in bits.

parameters.name: STRIDE_SUPPORT
parameters.description: Enable or disable support for 2D transfers with configurable stride.

parameters.name: FRAME_SYNC
parameters.description: Enable or disable external frame synchronization inputs.

features: Support for AXI4, AXI-Stream, AXI4-Lite, and Wishbone protocols

dependencies.name: sbt
dependencies.description: Scala Build Tool required for building the Chisel-based design.

dependencies.name: scala
dependencies.description: Scala programming language required for Chisel.

dependencies.name: java
dependencies.description: Java runtime required for running Scala and sbt.

dependencies.name: imagemagick
dependencies.description: ImageMagick required for generating test output images.

testbenches.name: testM2M
testbenches.description: Memory-to-memory transfer test with configurable parameters.

testbenches.name: testS2M
testbenches.description: Stream-to-memory transfer test with configurable parameters.
